topic: How a Sanad office in Muscat eliminated double-entry and cut admin time by half
format: State the result first, then walk backwards step by step to show exactly what made it possible
post:
One Muscat Sanad office. 40+ clients. Admin time cut in half — in under 30 days.

Here's exactly what happened.

They were managing 40+ clients: work permits, MOL filings, Sanad renewals. Every update got typed twice — once into a spreadsheet, once into a WhatsApp message. Deadlines lived in someone's head.

When a permit slipped, they found out because the client called.

They switched to SmartPRO Hub. Case updates now push automatically to the client portal. The client sees it in real time. Nobody types it twice.

WPS payroll, SPF contributions, and Omanisation ratios sit in the same system as the Sanad workflow. One input. Everything updates.

Admin hours dropped 50%. Deadline misses hit zero in month one.

They didn't hire more staff. They just stopped having two people enter the same data in two different places.

If your team is still copying information between WhatsApp and spreadsheets, that's where your hours are going.
